name: Arlington Financial Center
description_short: Frost Bank's Central Arlington Financial Center is a full-service bank branch offering checking, savings, investments, insurance, and mortgage services since 1868.
description_long:
Frost Bank, established in 1868, operates the Central Arlington Financial Center as part of a regional banking network serving Texas customers. The location has been designed as a comprehensive financial hub where customers can access traditional banking services alongside investment and insurance products under one roof. The Central Arlington branch is situated at 101 E Abram Street, Suite 160 in Arlington, Texas, and operates during standard business hours Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, with the lobby currently closed on weekends.

The Central Arlington Financial Center offers a complete suite of financial services including personal and business banking, investment management, insurance products, mortgage lending, and notary services. Customers can conduct transactions through walk-up ATMs available during daylight hours, schedule in-person appointments with financial advisors, and access accounts remotely through the Frost mobile app and online banking platform. The branch serves as a relationship-based banking center where customers can discuss comprehensive financial planning needs with trained representatives.

Frost Bank distinguishes itself through its 155+ year history and disciplined relationship banking approach. The institution emphasizes treating every customer as significant and maintaining a philosophy of providing a fair deal while keeping customer assets safe. The bank has earned recognition on Forbes Magazine's Best Employers List, suggesting institutional stability and quality operations. Their integrated service model—combining banking, investments, and insurance—allows customers to consolidate financial relationships rather than working with multiple providers.

The Central Arlington location functions as one of several Frost branches in the Arlington area, with nearby alternatives at North Arlington, Matlock, and Lake Arlington. While Frost offers comprehensive services, customers should note the limited weekend hours (closed Saturday and Sunday) and that ATM access during non-business hours is restricted to daylight-only availability. The branch's appointment-based service model may require scheduling in advance rather than accommodating walk-in visits, particularly for specialized financial services.
pros: Established 1868 heritage with 155+ years of banking history and stability
Comprehensive integrated services: banking, investments, insurance, and mortgages in one location
24/7 phone support available at (800) 513-7678 for customer inquiries
Mobile app and online banking platform for remote account access and management
Walk-up ATM available during daylight hours for convenient cash access
Notary services available on-site without requiring separate appointments
Forbes-recognized employer suggesting quality operations and staff training
cons: Limited hours: closed weekends (Saturday and Sunday), Monday-Friday only 9 AM-5 PM
ATM access restricted to daylight hours only, limiting after-hours cash withdrawals
Appointment scheduling required for many services, not ideal for drop-in customers
No 24-hour lobby access despite 24/7 phone support availability
Located only in Suite 160, potentially difficult to find within the building
best_for: Customers seeking integrated banking and investment services at a single branch
Business owners needing relationship-based banking with dedicated advisor support
Individuals prioritizing established institutions with century-plus track records
Families wanting comprehensive financial planning including mortgages and insurance
diagnosis: Central Arlington Financial Center is best for established customers seeking relationship-based banking with integrated investment and insurance services from a stable, century-old institution. The main caveat is limited accessibility outside standard business hours (closed weekends, ATM daylight-only) and the requirement to schedule appointments rather than accommodate walk-in service.
meta_description: Frost Bank's Arlington branch offers checking, savings, investments, and mortgages since 1868.
